mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_CHAT_LOG (CHAT_ID, MEMBER_ID, QUESTION, ANSWER) VALUES (TRV_CHAT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{question}, #{answer})
mapper.select: SELECT CHAT_ID AS chatId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, QUESTION AS question, ANSWER AS answer, REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TRV_CHAT_LOG WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY CHAT_ID DESC
